SEARCH
Package edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.service.respository

Class CollectedFossilRepositoryImpl

java.lang.Object
edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.service.respository.CollectedFossilRepositoryImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
CollectedFossilRepository
public class CollectedFossilRepositoryImpl extends Object implements CollectedFossilRepository
Implementation of CollectedFossilRepository that delegates to the corresponding DAO for database operations.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    LiveData<List<CollectedFossil>>
    getAllByFavoriteStateOrderByDateCollectedDesc(long userId, boolean favorite)
    Retrieves collected fossils for a specific user filtered by favorite status and ordered by collection date (newest first) as observable live data.
    LiveData<List<CollectedFossil>>
    getAllOrderByDateCollectedDesc(long userId)
    Retrieves all collected fossils for a specific user, ordered by collection date (newest first) as observable live data.
    CompletableFuture<List<CollectedFossil>>
    getAllWithoutFossil(long userId)
    Retrieves all collected fossils for a specific user that don't have associated fossil stats yet, asynchronously.
    CompletableFuture<Long>
    insert(CollectedFossil collectedFossil)
    Inserts a new collected fossil into the database asynchronously.
    CompletableFuture<Boolean>
    setFavoriteState(CollectedFossil collectedFossil, boolean favoriteState)
    Updates the favorite status of a collected fossil asynchronously.
    CompletableFuture<Boolean>
    setFossil(CollectedFossil collectedFossil, Fossil fossil)
    Associates a fossil type with a collected fossil asynchronously.

  • Method Details

    • getAllOrderByDateCollectedDesc

      public LiveData<List<CollectedFossil>> getAllOrderByDateCollectedDesc(long userId)
      Description copied from interface: CollectedFossilRepository
      Retrieves all collected fossils for a specific user, ordered by collection date (newest first) as observable live data.
      Specified by:
      getAllOrderByDateCollectedDesc in interface CollectedFossilRepository
      Parameters:
      userId - User ID.
      Returns:
      LiveData containing list of collected fossils ordered by date.

    • getAllByFavoriteStateOrderByDateCollectedDesc

      public LiveData<List<CollectedFossil>> getAllByFavoriteStateOrderByDateCollectedDesc(long userId, boolean favorite)
      Description copied from interface: CollectedFossilRepository
      Retrieves collected fossils for a specific user filtered by favorite status and ordered by collection date (newest first) as observable live data.
      Specified by:
      getAllByFavoriteStateOrderByDateCollectedDesc in interface CollectedFossilRepository
      Parameters:
      userId - User ID.
      favorite - Whether to retrieve favorite or non-favorite fossils.
      Returns:
      LiveData containing list of collected fossils matching the favorite status, ordered by date.

    • insert

      public CompletableFuture<Long> insert(CollectedFossil collectedFossil)
      Description copied from interface: CollectedFossilRepository
      Inserts a new collected fossil into the database asynchronously.
      Specified by:
      insert in interface CollectedFossilRepository
      Parameters:
      collectedFossil - Collected fossil to insert.
      Returns:
      CompletableFuture containing the generated primary key ID.

    • setFossil

      public CompletableFuture<Boolean> setFossil(CollectedFossil collectedFossil, Fossil fossil)
      Description copied from interface: CollectedFossilRepository
      Associates a fossil type with a collected fossil asynchronously.
      Specified by:
      setFossil in interface CollectedFossilRepository
      Parameters:
      collectedFossil - Collected fossil to update.
      fossil - Fossil type to associate.
      Returns:
      CompletableFuture containing true if update was successful, false otherwise.

    • setFavoriteState

      public CompletableFuture<Boolean> setFavoriteState(CollectedFossil collectedFossil, boolean favoriteState)
      Description copied from interface: CollectedFossilRepository
      Updates the favorite status of a collected fossil asynchronously.
      Specified by:
      setFavoriteState in interface CollectedFossilRepository
      Parameters:
      collectedFossil - Collected fossil to update.
      favoriteState - New favorite status.
      Returns:
      CompletableFuture containing true if update was successful, false otherwise.

    • getAllWithoutFossil

      public CompletableFuture<List<CollectedFossil>> getAllWithoutFossil(long userId)
      Description copied from interface: CollectedFossilRepository
      Retrieves all collected fossils for a specific user that don't have associated fossil stats yet, asynchronously.
      Specified by:
      getAllWithoutFossil in interface CollectedFossilRepository
      Parameters:
      userId - User ID.
      Returns:
      CompletableFuture containing list of collected fossils without fossil stats.
